task_completion.description: Verify that a ground station named 'Dallas_Field' is configured with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict 'Edit Ground Station' window or ground station list showing 'Dallas_Field' with Latitude 32.7767, Longitude -96.7970 (or 96.7970 W), and Altitude 130m.

task_completion.description: Verify that a tracking module named 'Field_Testing' is created and assigned to the 'Dallas_Field' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window or tab titled 'Field_Testing'. The active ground station for this module should be shown as 'Dallas_Field'.

task_completion.description: Verify that satellites FO-29, RS-44, and AO-73 are included in the module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Field_Testing' module interface or its configuration window; it must display FO-29, RS-44, and AO-73 in the list of tracked satellites.

task_completion.description: Verify that the module layout is set to 'List Only'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Field_Testing' module interface should only show a tabular list of the satellites. There should be no map view or polar tracking view visible in this module.

task_completion.description: Verify that future pass predictions for FO-29 are exported to ~/Documents/FO29_passes.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save'/'Export' dialog in GPredict saving 'FO29_passes.txt' to the Documents folder, or a file manager/terminal window showing that 'FO29_passes.txt' exists in ~/Documents/.

task_completion.description: Verify that future pass predictions for RS-44 are exported to ~/Documents/RS44_passes.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save'/'Export' dialog in GPredict saving 'RS44_passes.txt' to the Documents folder, or a file manager/terminal window showing that 'RS44_passes.txt' exists in ~/Documents/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict application GUI to configure the tracking and generate predictions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GPredict application interface being interacted with (menus, dialogs, module windows), rather than terminal commands or scripts attempting to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the exported files contain actual pass prediction tables generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of the exported files are visible (e.g., via 'cat' or a text editor), they should look like genuine tabular data generated by GPredict (e.g., columns for AOS, LOS, Duration), not manually typed placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually create fake text files to bypass the export requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or 'echo' commands to manually type out and save the pass prediction files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dallas_Field coordinates: Latitude 32.7767, Longitude -96.7970 (or 96.7970 W), Altitude 130m. Required satellites: FO-29 (NORAD 24278), RS-44 (NORAD 44909), and AO-73 (NORAD 39444). Export file paths must be exactly /home/ga/Documents/FO29_passes.txt and /home/ga/Documents/RS44_passes.txt.
